footer.tagline: India's most trusted platform to find verified pandits for all religious ceremonies, pujas and sacred rituals.

home.hero_subtitle: Book experienced pandits for Vivah, Griha Pravesh, Havan & more.
home.find_perfect_pandit_desc: Trusted by 10,000+ families for all spiritual and religious ceremonies.
home.upcoming_festivals_desc: Book your pandit in advance for these highly auspicious occasions.
home.how_it_works_subtitle: Book a verified pandit in 4 simple steps
home.browse_by_puja_desc: Find specialized pandits for every spiritual occasion
home.sacred_knowledge_desc: Discover the spiritual significance behind ancient Vedic rituals.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Real experiences from families who found spiritual guidance through us.
home.get_verified_pandit_desc: Join our network of 5,000+ verified pandits and reach more yajmans in your area.
home.download_app_title: Experience Puja Path Sanskar on App
home.download_app_desc: Book pujas, track status, and connect with pandits on the go.
home.testimonials_text_1: Pt. Ramesh Sharma performed our Griha Pravesh puja beautifully. Very knowledgeable and punctual. Highly recommended!
home.testimonials_text_2: Booked Pt. Mahesh Pandey for our son's Namkaran ceremony. He explained every ritual in detail. Excellent experience!
home.testimonials_text_3: Pt. Vijay Dubey conducted Shradh puja with great devotion. Very satisfied with the service. Will book again.
home.testimonials_text_4: Found a great pandit for our Satyanarayan Katha within minutes. The platform is very easy to use.

steps.step_1_desc: Enter your city and find verified pandits available near you.
steps.step_2_desc: Browse profiles, read reviews, and select the best pandit for your ceremony.
steps.step_3_desc: Pick your date, fill in details, and confirm your booking instantly.
steps.step_4_desc: Your pandit arrives on time and performs the ceremony with full devotion.

pandits.hero_desc: Browse our network of experienced and verified pandits across 50+ cities in India. Book instantly for any puja or ceremony.
pandits.trust_verified_desc: Every pandit is personally verified with ID proof and background check.
pandits.trust_rated_desc: Real ratings from real customers after every puja ceremony.
pandits.trust_exp_desc: Minimum 3 years of experience required to list on PanditJi.
pandits.trust_cert_desc: Many pandits hold certifications from reputed Vedic institutions.
pandits.perfect_pandit_desc: Use filters to narrow down by city, specialization and experience
pandits.register_desc: Join PanditJi and connect with thousands of devotees looking for experienced pandits in your city. Registration is completely free!

pujas.hero_desc: Experience the divine through our complete range of religious ceremonies and Vedic rituals performed by verified experts.
pujas.browse_desc: Select a category or search for a specific ceremony
pujas.performed_desc: A typical puja ceremony follows these sacred steps
pujas.cant_find_desc: Contact our specialized team and we'll connect you with the right expert for any specific ceremony or ritual.

interest_modal.fill_details: Fill your details — our team will contact you within 1 hour 🙏
interest_modal.contact_soon: Our team will contact you soon on
interest_modal.safe_details: Your details are 100% safe. They will not be shared with anyone.
interest_modal.error_general: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.hero_desc: Have questions about booking a pandit or listing your services? Our team is available to assist you every day.
contact.back_within_24: We'll get back to you within 24 hours
contact.team_contact_shortly: Our team will contact you shortly.
contact.support_hours: Our support team is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM. We're happy to help!

register.get_yajman_en: Get new yajmans and puja bookings directly from your area.
register.after_verification: After registration and verification, your profile will be made live on the app.
register.click_to_complete: Click here to complete your registration

register.declaration_text: I hereby declare that all provided media and information is correct. Verification ke baad hi profile public ki jayegi.
